payload.title: [MEDIUM] Weak JWT secret accepted (length-only gate)
payload.description: sessions.js jwtSecret/cloud-auth jwtSecretSet only require length>=16 chars; 'aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa' passes. A guessable HS256 secret => forge arbitrary sessions (any sub) => impersonate anyone. FIX: require >=32 bytes of real entropy (reject low-entropy/dictionary), document openssl rand, fail closed at boot.
